About Me

I am a PhD student in the Division of Infection and Immunity at University College London, based in the Qimmuno lab, and supervised by Dr Andreas Tiffeau-Mayer and Prof. Benny Chain.

Education

  • PhD in Immunology, University College London (2025 - Present)
  • MSci in Physics, University College London (2023)
